title: SMARCB1 paper out in Nature Communications
---

Our collaborative paper with the Hong lab, *"SMARCB1 missense mutants disrupt SWI/SNF complex stability and remodeling activity,"* is now published in [Nature Communications](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41951591/). Congratulations to Alan Kang (recent lab alum), and to the whole team.
